changes.value:
registry.rs:59-72

`merge_yaml_sources(&mut self, sources)` — merges additional YAML into an existing registry.

Currently only tested indirectly via from_yaml_sources override tests. Needs direct tests:
1. Build registry, then merge_yaml_sources to add new commands
2. merge_yaml_sources overrides existing command fields
3. Invalid YAML in merge is skipped without affecting existing entries
